uncertainties.note: This sheet shows ONLY the 'Type of Income' block for the 'Grandchildren's Trust' asset slice (15 assets, VIACOMCBS INC CMN CLASS B .. Broad Street Senior Credit Partners II, L.P.). The 12-col Value grid and the wide Amount-of-Income/Transaction matrix are off-sheet (blank right side) and are nulled here; merge by asset name with the companion Value/Amount sheets downstream.

The 9 partnership/LP-LLC rows (FIDELIS INVESTORS LP through Broad Street Senior Credit Partners II) each carry an extra X in a narrow column LEFT of the 'None' column (header degraded, reads ~'SP'). All 15 rows have a clear X in the 'None' income column, so income recorded as NONE; the extra left-column mark on the 9 LP/LLC rows is unresolved (possible Partnership-income flag or an owner/value sub-flag).
GS Finance structured-note due dates (rows 3-5: 02/25/2021, 02/20/2021, 02/24/2020) partly degraded; tesseract variously read 02/25/2032; best-effort.
